items.headline: Albemarle, the biggest beneficiary of expanding lithium demand... Investment opinion Buy - Citi
items.snippet: Citi stated Albemarle will become a key beneficiary of the structural expansion in lithium demand. Global ESS battery production this year will reach approximately 950 GWh, a 35% increase year-on-year.

items.headline: This Divvie is the Ultimate Pick and Shovel Play on Elon Inc.
items.snippet: ALB extracts and processes the lightweight metal that goes inside every EV battery. ALB controls roughly 15% to 17% of global lithium supply.

items.headline: Albemarle Likely to Continue Growing Volumes Over the Coming Years, RBC Says
items.snippet: Albemarle (ALB) is likely to continue growing volumes over the coming years. Lithium supply is expected to remain tight through 2027. RBC reiterated outperform rating and boosted price target to 57.

items.headline: Albemarle (ALB) Q1 2026 Earnings Transcript
items.snippet: Global lithium consumption up 37%, with energy storage demand up 117% year over year. First quarter net sales increased 70% year-over-year. Adjusted EBITDA nearly tripled.
